nasb.text: Now the gatekeepers were Shallum and Akkub and Talmon and Ahiman and their relatives (Shallum the chief

esv.text: The gatekeepers were Shallum, Akkub, Talmon, Ahiman, and their kinsmen (Shallum was the chief);

cnv.text: 守門的有沙龍、亞谷、達們、亞希幔和他們的眾親族；沙龍是他們的首領。

ccb.text: 负责守门的是沙龙、亚谷、达们、亚希幔和他们的亲族，沙龙是他们的首领，
